characters.name: Roy
characters.description: Royis a security guard that works at theSeattle Museum of Art. He was featured in the episodeiHire An Idiot. Spencerhad to distract Roy in order to set up his bottle bot sculpture as an exhibit.Gibbydeliberately used his camera to take pictures, after Roy told him that flash photography wasn't allowed in the museum. Gibby then sprayed Roy with a can of silly string. This distraction allowed Spencer to sneak hisBottle Botinto the museum.

characters.name: 4th Grade Boy
characters.description: It has been suggested that this article should bemergedwithPenny Tee Employees. You can discuss this suggestion atCategory talk:Merge Candidate. In the episodeiSell Penny Tees,Samdecides to hire young 4th graders to make penny-tees instead of doing it herself. As you may know, there are few employees who get speaking roles for this episode of the iCarly saga. But there is a boy there that DOES get a speaking role, likea 4th grade girl. We do not know what his acting name is, nor who played the role of him. But all that is known about him is his last name is in between N and Z, because kids with last names from N-Z were sent to work with Carly and Freddie, like him. He eventually complains with the fourth grade girl that he wants to be treat a certain way, and quits like the otherkids.

characters.name: 4th Grade Girl
characters.description: It has been suggested that this article should bemergedwithPenny Tee Employees. You can discuss this suggestion atCategory talk:Merge Candidate. In the episodeiSell Penny-Tees, there are multiple 4th grade children that work forSam, originally to make thePenny-Tees. There are two main workers - one girl, and4th Grade Boy. Not much info is known on this girl, but has a last name that is in between A and M, because the children who stayed with Sam to work (including her) all had the last names from A through M. Her first name is unknown, but she attends the district inSeattle.

characters.name: Abigail
characters.description: Abigailis the orange tabby kitten ofMrs. Halberstadtandher middle-aged sonwho appeared in the episodeiScream On Halloween. Abigail is known to knock things over in her apartment, claw up people, and run around crazy for no good reason, as most kittens do. This scaresCarly,Sam, andFreddieand makes them think there is a ghost in the apartment.

characters.name: Lauren Ackerman
characters.description: Lauren AckermanPortrayed byJessica MakinsonOccupationTeacher (formerly)Relationship(s)Unknown boyfriend (2007 - 2008)Spencer Shay(2008, ex-boyfriend)ResidenceSeattle, WashingtonLauren Ackermanis the former History teacher atRidgeway Middle Schoolseen iniHave a Lovesick Teacher. She has centered her life around her boyfriends based on her relationship with Spencer Shay. Ms. Ackerman loves having steady boyfriends, but frequently tends to be obsessive over them, a sign of her being boyfriend-centered. This is what happened while she datedSpencer. She asked him why he didn't return six of her calls, which she kept track of in a notepad. After the scene Ms. Ackerman made, Spencer felt weirded out about it, so she tried to make Spencer like her by giving him a PearPod (with illegally downloaded music) and a panda-pig, a stuffed animal that had the combination of Spencer's two favorite animals: a panda and a pig. Ms. Ackerman tends to take her emotions out on her students, usually after a break-up with a boyfriend. After one of her nasty break-ups, she yelled at her students and forced them to do 10 to 15-page essays on subjects she never discussed in class. But once she began dating Spencer, Ms. Ackerman suddenly became a fun teacher. Her attitude towards her students has even changed as well. She offered the class caramel apples, and even invited them to go ice skating with her. However, when he broke up with her (for being psychotic), she began behaving worse than ever; she gave the students a pop quiz that would count as 90% of their final grades and graded Carly's 'F' without allowing her to take the quiz. She also made Carly and Freddie each do 100 jumping jacks, and made Sam wash her car. After this, the gang comes up with an idea to get rid of her,for good.

characters.name: Adam
characters.description: Adamis a minor character inSeason 4ofiCarly. He appears iniStart a Fanwarand is portrayed byMax Ehrich.[1] He isCarly's love interest for that episode. It had been rumored by fans that he would return, but eventually did not.[2] Adam makes his only appearance on the iCarly TV specialiStart a Fanwar. He is Carly's love interest for that episode, and obviously likes Carly since he asks her out and comes toWebiconjust to see her (see "Cadam"). He is seemingly jealous ofFreddie, believing that he and Carly have a "thing" going on due to theCreddieforums he saw, where the Creddiers were saying stuff about Carly and Freddie, and whenSamsaid that, "Carly and Freddie are deeply in love." He gets attacked by the Creddie shippers in the end, as they believe he was a "Creddie killer" and that he took Carly away from Freddie.

characters.name: Ado
characters.description: Adoappeared in the episode,iStart a Fan War. He was a random iCarly fan in the crowd atWebicon. His accent and appearance suggest he is Indian. He has a frequent habit of standing up and saying something out loud afterCarly,Sam, orFreddiestart a new sentence. He is aCreddieshipper, evident by the red pin-back button he was wearing that said "Creddie". He was portrayed by the British actorKal Mansoor. Worker from Webicon: Without further ado...Ado: My name is Ado!

characters.name: Albert
characters.description: AlbertCharacter InformationNickname(s)Mystic Zagnut (alias)GenderMaleOccupationParty performerSeries InformationPortrayerJoey RichFirst AppearanceLast Appearancei'M Cursedi'M CursedAlbertwas a party performer who Spencer paid $20 to pretend to be a "reader of fortunes and healer of misfortunes" named Mystic Zagnut. He later died as a result of an aneurysm. Spencer hired Albert in hopes that he could convince Carly that she is no longer affected by a birthday curse. Albert invites Carly to sit down at a table, where he repeats a spell. After sparks fly from the table, he claims that the gods of Fortuna have broken Carly's curse. Carly believes him and excitedly rips off her bubble wrap dress. However, Albert dies of an aneurysm, reinforcing the idea that Carly really is affected by a birthday curse.

characters.name: Alexavier
characters.description: AlexavierCharacter InformationGenderMaleOccupationFashion photographerPhysical DescriptionHair colorBlackEye colorBrownRelationshipsFriendsSpencer ShayOther InformationLikesBocceHarper's bubble wrap dressSeries InformationPortrayerJoel Kim BoosterFirst AppearanceLast Appearancei'M Cursedi'M CursedAlexavieris a noted fashion photographer thatHarperis a huge fan of. Alexavier is a noted fashion photographer.Harperis a huge fan of him and is speechless every time she sees him. Due to her stuttering, he believes that her name is "Merffin". Later,Spencer, who is a friend of Alexavier, invites him to Carly's party so Harper can meet him again. He is very impressed by the bubble wrap dress thatHarpercreates for Carly, but once again, Harper is unable to speak. After a drunk Freddie vomits on Alexavier, he leaves the party. Harper follows him as he leaves and helps him get cleaned up. She later explains via voice recording that she is a huge fan of him, and is unable to speak due to being awestruck.

characters.name: Alicia
characters.description: AliciaGenderFemaleOccupationNurseRomanceSpencer Shay(sperm donator and date)ChildrenPotter(daughter)Another unnamed childHair ColorBlackPortrayed ByNikki TuazonOnly AppearanceiReunited and It Felt OK Aliciawas a woman Spencer met iniReunited and It Felt OKas the mother to one of his 11 kids. She also revealed to have had a second kid with his sperm donation and is portrayed by Nikki Tuazon. Alicia became pregnant with Spencer's daughterPotterand because his sperm was so popular, she decided to have a second, resulting in Spencer having 11 kids rather than the 10 like he had originally thought. When Spencer learnt this, he asked Alicia out who agreed, but it was never revealed if she was still dating him after their date.

characters.name: Alison
characters.description: Alisonappears iniWas a Pageant GirlasSpencer's date for rock climbing. She was going to have to cancel because her 15-year-old cousin,Leslie, comes to visit but Spencer tells her not to because he thinks thatFreddiewould love to go with them as Leslie's date. First Freddie refuses, saying he doesn't go on blind dates but after Spencer throws a tantrum (Sam's idea), he gives in and accepts. When the girls arrive,Leslienotices the game "What Am I?" on the kitchen table. Since they had some time to kill before the rock climbing appointment, they all decide to play. They have fun at first but Freddie and Spencer get so caught up in the game they end up ignoring the girls completely. Alison even asks if the guys want to make out with them but gets no response. Alison and Leslie end up walking out of theapartmentannoyed, while Spencer and Freddie don't even notice.

characters.name: Anna Clark
characters.description:
Anna Clarkis an American child actress. Her only appearance so far oniCarlywas the "mysterious little girl" in the episodeiSpace Out. Spencer thought she was only a figment of his imagination because he missed Carly so much, but at the end of the episode, Carly could see her too. The girl did not respond to Carly and then left the apartment. 
She never appeared on another episode of iCarly.

characters.name: Argentina Woolridge
characters.description: Argentina WoolridgeCharacter InformationFull nameArgentina WoolridgeNickname(s)ArgenthinaGenderFemaleOccupationFounder ofLeapINPhysical DescriptionHair colorBlondeRelationshipsRomance(s)Spencer Shay(ex-boyfriend)EnemiesCarly ShaySpencer ShayHarper BettencourtOther InformationLikesLeapInManipulating othersSeries InformationPortrayerChristine TaylorFirst AppearanceLast AppearanceiNeed SpaceiNeed SpaceArgentina Woolridge(over-pronounced as ArgenTHina) is the founder ofLeapINand the main antagonist ofiNeed Space. She is portrayed byChristine Taylor. Argentina is the founder ofLeapIN. She claims to be a Harvard and MIT graduate, and on a Forbes list of women with unlisted ages. Argentina dated Spencer to get to Carly and her subscribers. When Carly discovers that she uses her nests at LeapN to secretly mine data, Argentina threatens to erase Harper's look book unless she allows her to promote LeapIN on iCarly, so Carly unwillingly brings Argentina to theiCarly Studio. While at the studio, Argentina reveals her true intentions, which is to promote LeapIN on iCarly and have her company go global by manipulating women, secretly mining their data and taking advantage of their insecurities. Unbeknownst to her, Carly's camera was recording the whole time. They make a deal to erase the footage after Carly explains the consequences of the public finding out about this, and Argentina returns Harper's flash drive.

characters.name: Arty
characters.description: Artyis the cousin ofSocko, one ofSpencer's best friends. He was mentioned inSam's blog; as the creator of the iCarly cartoons which appeared for a short while on the iCarly website. The whole Socko family is known to have names that is related to what they are well known for/good at. It seems Arty got his name from his talent of art, which is shown by his amazing cartoon sketches of the iCarly website. He was called to do the sketches by Sam, who got tired of looking at the same pictures every time she went to the iCarly site. She seems to agree of his talent too.

characters.name: Aruthor
characters.description: Aruthor, "Defender of the Hoobscher Fyord," is a character in the massively multiplayer online role-playing game (MMORPG)World of Warlords. According to Spencer, Aruthor is the greatest warrior in the entire realm of World of Warlords. His powers are equaled by no other." Spencer further claims that Aruthor is so powerful, he would annihilate the similarly mightyAspartamay(the supreme warrior of the Pernicious Berm), though it is canon that the two could never do battle because they are separated by the "Farquhar Dimensional Plane."(which means that they are enemies). Apparently, were Aruthor and Aspartamay ever to fight, such a confrontation would be volatile enough to destroy the game's "multiverse." Spencer, cosplaying as Aruthor.

characters.name: Ashley
characters.description: AshleyAshleyCharacter InformationFull nameAshleyGenderFemaleOccupationSeattle Tech sociology majorEducationSeattle TechRelationshipsFriendsFreddie BensonEnemiesCarly ShaySam PuckettSeries InformationPortrayerTeresa CastilloFirst AppearanceLast AppearanceiHire An IdiotiHire An IdiotAshleyis an intern and sociology major from Seattle Tech thatFreddiehired iniHire An Idiot. Freddie 'hires' her to get revenge onCarlyandSamfor hiringCortsimply because of his good looks. She acts extremely dumb for most of the episode, but in the end, Carly and Sam discover that Ashley's actually very intelligent (she explains that she's even at the top of her class at her school) and that she also works at the Brilliance Bar in the Pear Store. Freddie went to Ashley about his plan to get back at Carly and Sam for hiring Cort instead of a more qualified intern, shortly after Cort accidentally destroyed his technical gear for the show, including his PearBook, by spilling lemonade all over it a mere few seconds into the webcast. She agreed to it and even used it as a thesis for one of her classes. It's possible that Freddie has a crush on her, because he let out a sigh when she left.

characters.name: Audrey
characters.description: Audreyis an ex-girlfriend ofSpencer. He claims she was the only one he was everreallyin love with. IniGoodbye, he plans to meet her, but whenhis dadisn't able to make it home to take her to an Air Force father-daughter dance the same night, he cancels on Audrey to take Carly to the dance.

characters.name: Austin
characters.description:
AustinFirst Appearance"iSpeed Date"Portrayed byKevin FonteyneLikesTalkingCarly Shay(Formerly) Austinis a very talkative guy who appeared iniSpeed Date. He was the date ofCarly Shayuntil she told him to "shut up" and to "get out of here" at theGroovy Smoothie. He had an extremely annoying habit of interrupting Carly    
whenever she spoke, as if he couldn't hear her. But whenever somebody else talks, he never interrupted. This was not the case when Carly met him, due to the fact that she only had fifteen (or probably at least thirty; she reset the timer at least once) seconds to get to know him. He seemed funny, charming and interesting at first, but it seems he always had a huge urge to talk. Just before she tells him to shut up and go away, Carly says that he didn't let her finish one sentence the entire evening because he interrupts saying random things. He seemed to get along withSpencer, atCarly's apartment. Spencer and Austin were talking about cameras; Carly thought Austin had the same camera asFreddie. Austin was played byKevin Fonteyne.

characters.name: Austin
characters.description:
AustinFirst Appearance"iSpeed Date"Portrayed byKevin FonteyneLikesTalkingCarly Shay(Formerly) Austinis a very talkative guy who appeared iniSpeed Date. He was the date ofCarly Shayuntil she told him to "shut up" and to "get out of here" at theGroovy Smoothie. He had an extremely annoying habit of interrupting Carly    
whenever she spoke, as if he couldn't hear her. But whenever somebody else talks, he never interrupted. This was not the case when Carly met him, due to the fact that she only had fifteen (or probably at least thirty; she reset the timer at least once) seconds to get to know him. He seemed funny, charming and interesting at first, but it seems he always had a huge urge to talk. Just before she tells him to shut up and go away, Carly says that he didn't let her finish one sentence the entire evening because he interrupts saying random things. He seemed to get along withSpencer, atCarly's apartment. Spencer and Austin were talking about cameras; Carly thought Austin had the same camera asFreddie. Austin was played byKevin Fonteyne.

characters.name: Baby Chicks
characters.description: The Baby Chickswere hatched byCarlyandSamfor a science project in the episodeiHatch Chicks. They somehow escaped their incubator, and the iCarly crew had to search the entire apartment to find them. The names of the chicks don't say anything about their gender as they were just simply named in the order they were put back in the incubator. Their names are actually egg-related.Spencerdrew a picture of all of them together. The chicks are mentioned once more iniApril Foolsand the scene in which Sam and Carly find Poachy behind the elevator window is recreated though it is altered.

characters.name: Barry Schatz
characters.description:
Barry Schatzis a reporter from the Video Game channel, (a parody of G4), who made an appearance in the episodeiStage an Intervention. He shows up at the Shay's apartment with a camera crew and a handful of Video Game channel viewers to broadcast the return ofSasha Strikerin her battle againstSpencerto redeem her title and the world record in the arcade game,Pak-Rat.  One of the nerdy male viewers in attendance keeps jumping on camera during the broadcast and says he is looking for women to date him, but Barry chases him away by hitting him in the head with the microphone he carries everywhere. On the iCarly live video on the actual website (not shown in the episode), Barry tells the nerd "I told you not to do that!".
He also announces Spencer's world-record achievement of beating Sasha Striker and becoming the "Best Pak-Rat Player in the World."

characters.name: Beau
characters.description: BeauCharacter InformationNickname(s)Dude, My Man, Fam (by Wes)GenderMaleAge20sOccupationInternet personalityCo-host of The Weau Bros Show (formerly)ResidenceSeattle, WashingtonPhysical DescriptionHair colorBlackEye colorBrownRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed Mother (Deceased)Unnamed FatherFriendsWes(best friend)Carly Shay(formerly)Romance(s)Carly Shay(ex-girlfriend)Lita (ex-girlfriend)[1]EnemiesWes(formerly)Carly ShayOther InformationLikesTaking RisksLive streamingSeries InformationPortrayerConor HustingFirst AppearanceLast AppearanceiStart OveriGuess Everyone Just Hates Me NowBeauis Carly's ex-boyfriend who first appears iniStart Over. He is portrayed byConor Husting. Beau is an online content creator who worked with Carly during their relationship. However, he broke up with her iniStart Over. IniReturn to Webicon, he shows up at Webicon to present Carly her award, much to the annoyance of her then-boyfriendWes.
